title: USS Pope
summary:
USS Pope may refer to the following ships of the United States Navy:

USS Pope (DD-225), a Clemson-class destroyer, commissioned in 1920 and sunk in battle in 1942.
USS Pope (DE-134), an Edsall-class destroyer escort, commissioned in 1943 and decommissioned in 1946.
text:
USS Pope may refer to the following ships of the United States Navy:

USS Pope (DD-225), a Clemson-class destroyer, commissioned in 1920 and sunk in battle in 1942.
